body.title: Episodic consolidation ratio 18:1 (target 2:1)
body.result: Batch 20→200, interval 3600→1800s, model DeepSeek7B→qwen2.5:7b, min_importance 0.5→0.4. At 200/30min: ~225 hours to process backlog (down from 2250). qwen2.5:7b proven in D360 benchmark.
body.description: 44,854 episodics vs 2,545 interpretive = 18:1 ratio. Target is 2:1. Consolidation daemon runs hourly but extracts too few patterns from episodic clusters. Root causes: (1) 1b model quality too low for pattern extraction, (2) consolidation only runs hourly, (3) no batch mode. Fix options: run during Sleep mode with 8b model, batch larger clusters, or use graph-only extraction (keyword overlap clustering without LLM).
